AI Integration

AI is the curriculum.
Not a footnote.

We don't just mention ChatGPT in passing. Every module teaches you to use AI tools the way top analysts actually work.

🤖 ChatGPT
✨ MS Copilot
🐍 Python
📊 Forecast AI
💬

ChatGPT Formula Writer

Describe what you need in plain English. Get the formula instantly.

✨

Copilot Automation

Auto-generate reports, summaries, and charts with one command.

📈

Predictive Analytics

Use AI to forecast trends and build smarter business dashboards.

🐍

Python + Excel

Intro to pandas, xlwings and data science workflows in Excel.

Excel AI Assistant — ChatGPT + Excel
# ChatGPT writes your formula
You → "Find sales for each region where sales > 50000"
AI → =SUMIF(B:B,F2,C:C)
# Copilot generates a report
You → "Summarise Q4 data as a chart"
AI → ✅ Bar chart created with insights
# Python + Excel
>>> import pandas as pd
>>> df = pd.read_excel('sales.xlsx')
>>> df.describe()
Full Syllabus

Everything you'll master

Click any module to expand the full lesson list.

1
Excel Fundamentals
5 lessons▼
  • Excel interface & startup screen
  • Managing workbooks & shortcuts
  • Cell references & basic formulas
  • Entering & editing data
  • Date & time functions
2
Core Functions
6 lessons▼
  • SUM, MIN, MAX, AVERAGE, COUNT
  • IF, nested IF, IFERROR
  • COUNTIF, SUMIF, AVERAGEIF
  • VLOOKUP, HLOOKUP
  • INDEX & MATCH
  • Text functions: LEFT, RIGHT, MID, LEN
3
Formatting & Visualisation
5 lessons▼
  • Conditional formatting rules
  • Column, pie, line & combo charts
  • Dynamic charts & sparklines
  • Professional dashboard design
  • Report & bill formatting
4
Data Management
5 lessons▼
  • Sorting, filtering & subtotals
  • Data validation & dropdowns
  • Removing duplicates
  • Grouping & consolidating data
  • Importing & exporting
5
Pivot Tables & Power Pivot
5 lessons▼
  • Creating & modifying pivot tables
  • Pivot charts & slicers
  • Grouping data in pivots
  • Power Pivot & data models
  • KPIs with Power Pivot
6
Advanced Analytics
4 lessons▼
  • Forecast sheet & trend analysis
  • What-If Analysis & Goal Seek
  • Consolidating multi-sheet data
  • Protecting workbooks & passwords
AI
🤖 AI Integration Modules NEW
7 lessons▼
  • ChatGPT to write & explain formulas
  • Microsoft Copilot in Excel — automation
  • AI-generated dashboards & reports
  • Predictive analytics with AI models
  • Python + pandas for Excel data science
  • Natural language queries in Excel
  • AI-powered data cleaning techniques
8
Capstone Project
1 project▼
  • Build a full AI-powered business dashboard
  • Real dataset from a company case study
  • Use ChatGPT + Copilot + Pivot Tables
  • Present & submit for certification
L1
🌈 Explorers (Ages 4–7)
4 lessons▼
  • What is a computer & spreadsheet?
  • Colouring cells — art in Excel!
  • Counting with SUM (my toy collection)
  • Making a rainbow chart of my day
L2
🚀 Adventurers (Ages 8–11)
5 lessons▼
  • Building a personal budget tracker
  • Fun with IF formulas — pass/fail game
  • VLOOKUP treasure hunt challenge
  • Creating a family data chart
  • AI: Generate stories from data!
L3
🏆 Champions (Ages 12–14)
5 lessons▼
  • Pivot tables with cricket/sports data
  • Conditional formatting magic tricks
  • School grade tracker project
  • Dashboard creation challenge
  • AI: Copilot automates your data
AI
🤖 AI Play Mode NEW
3 lessons▼
  • Ask the AI bot a question about your data
  • AI storytelling — make a story from numbers
  • Copilot draws a chart for you!
1
Foundation + Excel Essentials
5 lessons▼
  • Excel for research & academic data
  • Survey data tabulation & charts
  • Statistical functions for assignments
  • Academic report formatting
  • Data validation for clean submissions
2
Business & Career Analytics
5 lessons▼
  • Business analysis case studies
  • Financial modelling basics
  • Internship-ready Excel skills
  • Resume & portfolio project
  • Interview preparation — Excel tests
AI
🤖 AI for College Students NEW
4 lessons▼
  • AI-assisted literature review analysis
  • ChatGPT + Excel for project reports
  • Data visualisation with AI tools
  • LinkedIn + Excel portfolio showcase
4
Capstone Project
1 project▼
  • Real business dataset analysis
  • AI-assisted insights & recommendations
  • Professional presentation of findings
  • Submit for certification
